title: Overview - Hybrid Client API Part B
content: Reward Geni Hybrid Client API Part B documentation for point balance sync and point redemption.
keywords: reward geni hybrid client api part b overview

title: Authentication
content: Reward Geni uses token-based authentication: POST /auth/token for Bearer token, then Authorization header for API calls.

title: Base URL
content: Base URL is configured as hybridClientApiBaseUrl for the client account.

title: Endpoints Overview
content: GET /v1/points/:externalUserId and POST /v1/redeem are the two required Part B endpoints.

title: Timeouts and Retry
content: Point balance timeout is 10 seconds, redeem timeout is 15 seconds, retry up to 2 times on network errors.

title: Getting Started
content: Quick Start implementation for Hybrid Client API Part B.

title: Getting Started - Prerequisites
content: Prerequisites for implementing Part B endpoints and authentication.

title: Getting Started - Authentication
content: Token-based authentication: POST /auth/token, then Authorization: Bearer + x-rg-secret headers.

title: Getting Started - Base URL
content: Reward Geni admin stores your endpoint root as hybridClientApiBaseUrl.

title: Getting Started - Implement Endpoints
content: Implement GET /v1/points/:externalUserId and POST /v1/redeem with standard errors.

title: Getting Started - First Request Example
content: First balance request examples using cURL and JavaScript Fetch.

title: POST /auth/token
content: Generate a Bearer token using clientId and clientSecret for subsequent API calls.

title: API Reference Overview
content: Complete request and response references for Part B endpoints.

title: GET /v1/points/:externalUserId
content: Returns externalUserId, totalPoints, and blocks including blockId, description, points, transactionType, expiresAt.

title: POST /v1/redeem
content: Deduct points with externalUserId, points, orderId, orderNumber, orderType, orderDate, orderItem, description.

title: API Error Codes
content: HC_402_001 insufficient points, HC_404_001 user not found, HC_500_001 internal server error, HC_503_001 service unavailable.

title: Integration Guide
content: Implementation guidance for Part B in production.

title: Guide - Error Handling
content: Return structured JSON errors with success, code, and message.

title: Guide - Timeouts and Retry
content: Timeout and retry expectations for balance and redeem endpoints.

title: Guide - Idempotency
content: Use orderId as idempotency key to avoid duplicate deduction on retries.
